description: Triggers a {{Link|https://partner.steamgames.com/doc/features/timeline|Steam Timeline}} event within the {{Link|https://store.steampowered.com/gamerecording|Game Recording}} feature. Read [[Arma 3: Steam Game Recording]] for more information and a list of all available event icons.
examples: <sqf>steamGameRecordingEvent ["ZeusUI", 5, [], -5]; //Was in the Zeus UI during the last 5 seconds</sqf>
<sqf>steamGameRecordingEvent ["StartGamePhase", "ArmaInvaders"]; //Starting a game phase for [[Arma 3: Invaders]] with a unique ID</sqf>
name: steamGameRecordingEvent

ret.desc: event handle (which can be used to edit an event after it has been triggered)

ArraySized.desc: class in [[description.ext]] >> "SteamGameRecording" or config "SteamManagerConfig" >> "GameRecording" or a special utility string
ArraySized.name: eventClass

ArraySized.desc: 0 for an instant event, or an amount of seconds this event lasted
ArraySized.name: eventDuration

ArraySized.desc: arguments that can be used to add dynamic info to the event (texts)
ArraySized.name: eventArguments

ArraySized.desc: amount of seconds relative to the even trigger time
ArraySized.name: startOffset
